properties.name: app.auth.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret used to sign JWT tokens. Use a long random value in production.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.access-token-minutes
properties.description: Access token validity period in minutes.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.refresh-token-days
properties.description: Refresh token validity period in days.

properties.name: app.auth.jwt.cookie-secure
properties.description: Whether auth cookies are marked Secure.
